architecture_fit.note: Single attention layer, MLP dropped (base_model delta); traces paths via genuine softmax(QK^T) content-addressing, not answer-key indexing.

baseline_comparison.note: Ablation bar contrasts full circuit (~1.0) vs addr-ablated (~depth-only) vs scrambled (~0.07 uniform baseline), a clear strawman-fails comparison.

faithfulness.note: No trained model to patch (synthetic, stated honestly); input ablations zeroing/scrambling address codes give solid causal evidence the head uses the geometry.

operating_range.note: Near-perfect (~0.999, robustness 0.999) across depths 2/3/4 and all 4 path rules via fixed depth-independent Wq/Wk; no breaking-point probed beyond depth 4.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entire mechanism is hand-set Q/K selection matrices reproducing target behavior — exactly the hand-built circuit the bonus rewards.

visual_judgement.note: Demo heatmap with red ✕ on true target plus query bar, ablation bar, and depth/rule sweep make the claim legible and checkable.

visualisation_rationale.note: README ties each panel to the claim: target overlay = path tracing, ablation = faithfulness, sweep = operating range, with correct baseline on axis.

notes: A clean, minimal hand-built QK content-addressing circuit (single attention layer, no MLP) that traces tree paths by resolving targets through dot-product geometry rather than indexing the answer key, fixing the prior first_pass flaw. Near-perfect metrics across depths and path rules, with honest input-ablation baselines (addr-ablated, scrambled) standing in for causal evidence on a synthetic task. Strong visualisation and rationale; the only real limits are the absence of a trained model and no probing past depth 4.
